tasks.title: Underwriting intake evidence checklist
tasks.prompt: Use the uploaded synthetic Proximitty underwriting files. Begin the answer with the phrase 'Synthetic evaluation only'. Create an evidence checklist for HarborPoint Robotics. Separate supported facts from needs_review items. Do not approve, decline, price, bind, lend, insure, or make a real decision.
